codeReview.summary: The commit delivers the feature intent: it introduces a centralized `frontend/src/components/icons/index.tsx` module, replaces inline SVG usage across the affected components with named icon components, and ensures decorative SVG rendering flows through `IconBase` with `aria-hidden="true"`. The diff also adds focused accessibility assertions (dropzone keyboard role/tabindex, export button label, header tooltip), and no blocking or non-blocking implementation defects were found in this feature scope.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Shared architecture docs and milestone feature contract disagree on icon module placement, which can cause worker confusion for future icon work.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Mission feature contract expects `components/icons/index.ts` (`features.json` line 1385), while `.factory/library/architecture.md` still documents icon set under `components/ui/` (line 71). The reviewed commit implements `frontend/src/components/icons/index.tsx`.

summary: Reviewed feature `m6-centralize-icons` on commit `ebe1cf2`; implementation satisfies the described icon-centralization and decorative-SVG accessibility goals, so this scrutiny review passes. One shared-state documentation mismatch was recorded.
